disclaimer.cardOne:
### 🧪 Test Mode

This AI assistant is currently in **test mode**.  
Responses may be _incomplete or inaccurate_.
disclaimer.cardTwo:
### 📚 Legal Documents Loading

The bot is currently trained based on the **Labor Code of the Republic of Uzbekistan**.  
_Other legal documents are not yet fully loaded or studied._
disclaimer.cardThree:
### ⚖️ For Legal Questions Only

Please ask questions related only to **labor relations**.  
_The bot is not designed for technical or personal consultations._
disclaimer.cardFour:
### 📌 Not Official Advice

The bot's responses are generated **for informational purposes only**.  
_They cannot replace official legal advice._

info.title: Dashboard
info.organizationsDesc: Complete information about all organizations, branches, and leaders within the system of JSC 'Uzbekistan Railways'. Learn about their location, structure, and hierarchy.
info.positionsDesc: List of positions available at JSC 'Uzbekistan Railways' and their functional duties. Structural distribution of employee positions is provided.
info.laborCodeDesc: Relations between employees and employers, rights, and obligations based on the Labor Code of the Republic of Uzbekistan. Explanations and legislative norms are provided by articles.
info.emptyDesc: There is no information in this section yet. New services or useful content will be added soon.

telegramPopup.header: Connect to our Telegram bot and enjoy the following benefits:

benefit.1: Document status – Confirmation, rejection, or editing — stay informed about everything!
benefit.2: Congratulations – We’ll celebrate your birthday or work achievements!
benefit.3: Important reminders – About vacations, meetings, and key information on time.
benefit.4: Real-time notifications – Nothing will go unnoticed!
benefit.5: Profile updates – Get instant notifications about changes to your data in Telegram!
benefit.footer: Everything in one place – just for you and on time!
